// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

[Flags]
internal enum ClassEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class ClassEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 2;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "First",
                "Second"
            };

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum[] {
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First,
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum Parse(string value, Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class ClassEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum value) => value switch
    {
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First => "First",
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second => "Second",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum value, Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First) return "First";
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second) return "Second";
        }

        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.ClassEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();
    }

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.First:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum.Second:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedClass.ClassEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

[Flags]
internal enum StructEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class StructEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 2;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "First",
                "Second"
            };

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum[] {
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First,
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum Parse(string value, Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;

    }
}

{

    {
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First => "First",
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second => "Second",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum value, Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First) return "First";
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second) return "Second";
        }

        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.StructEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.First:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum.Second:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedStruct.StructEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }
}

[Flags]
internal enum RecordEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class RecordEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 2;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "First",
                "Second"
            };

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum[] {
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First,
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum Parse(string value, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;

    }

internal static partial class RecordEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum value) => value switch
    {
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First => "First",
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second => "Second",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum value, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First) return "First";
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second) return "Second";
        }

        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();
    }

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.First:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum.Second:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecord.RecordEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }

using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

[Flags]
internal enum RecordStructEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class RecordStructEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 2;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "First",
                "Second"
            };

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum[] {
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First,
                Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum Parse(string value, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;

    }
}

using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class RecordStructEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum value) => value switch
    {
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First => "First",
        Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second => "Second",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum value, Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First) return "First";
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second) return "Second";
        }

        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.RecordStructEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();
    }

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.First:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum.Second:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.NestedRecordStruct.RecordStructEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

[Flags]
internal enum InterfaceEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class Enums
{
    internal static partial class InterfaceEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 2;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "First",
                "Second"
            };

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum[] {
                Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First,
                Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                0,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum result, Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("0", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum Parse(string value, Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

namespace Some.Namespace.Here;

internal static partial class InterfaceEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum value) => value switch
    {
        Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First => "First",
        Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second => "Second",
        _ => value.ToString()
    };

    public static string GetString(this Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum value, Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat format = Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Name) == Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First) return "First";
            if (value == Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second) return "Second";
        }

        if ((format & Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Value) == Some.Namespace.Here.InterfaceEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();
    }

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.First:
                underlyingValue = 0;
                return true;
            case Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum.Second:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this Some.Namespace.Here.INestedInterface.InterfaceEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }
}
